title: SourceDocument
description: Unified output contract for every ingestion collector, regardless of platform. Collectors fill everything except `cleaned`, which is produced by the cleaning stage.

id.description: Deterministic document id: <platform>:<platform-native-id>. Stable across re-runs so re-ingestion upserts instead of duplicating.

schemaVersion.description: Version of this schema the document conforms to.

personaId.description: Persona pack id this content belongs to (folder name in src/data/personas).

sourceType.description: What kind of content this is on the platform, e.g. video-transcript, video-description, page, article, post, thread, repo-readme, profile.

title.description: Human-readable title. For untitled content (tweets, posts) collectors derive a short excerpt-based title.

url.description: Canonical public URL of the original content.

publishedAt.description: Original publication timestamp (ISO 8601). Null when the platform does not expose one.

collectedAt.description: When the collector fetched this document.

language.description: BCP-47 language tag if detectable, e.g. en, hi, hi-Latn.

tags.description: Platform tags/hashtags/categories plus any collector-assigned topic labels.

author.description: Author handle or display name as shown on the platform.

raw.description: Content exactly as collected, before any cleaning.

content.description: Unmodified text payload (HTML, markdown, transcript with timestamps, JSON string, etc.).

metadata.description: Platform-specific extras that don't fit the shared fields (view counts, likes, duration, repo stars, etc.). Free-form; never required downstream.

cleaned.description: Output of the cleaning/normalization stage. Collectors emit this as null-content placeholder; the cleaner fills it.

content.description: Plain text: markup stripped, boilerplate removed, whitespace normalized, timestamps removed from transcripts.

cleanerVersion.description: Version of the cleaning pipeline that produced this, for reprocessing decisions.

contentHash.description: Hash of raw.content for change detection and dedup across re-runs.
